title: Generate R program for Table 14-4.02 AE by SOC and PT with 5% threshold

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using rtables or Tplyr to generate Table 14-4.02: Adverse Events by System Organ Class and Preferred Term. The program must: (1) Read ADAE and ADSL datasets, (2) Filter to Safety population (SAFFL='Y') and treatment-emergent AEs (TRTEMFL='Y'), (3) For each SOC/PT, count subjects with at least one AE: n (%), where % denominator is N within treatment group, (4) Apply 5% threshold: show only PTs where any treatment group has >= 5% incidence, (5) Sort by SOC frequency (descending), then PT alphabetically within SOC, (6) Include an 'Any AE' summary row at top, (7) Format columns: Placebo (N=XX), Xan Low (N=XX), Xan High (N=XX), (8) Handle MedDRA hierarchy sorting, (9) Output RTF matching mock shell specifications.
